author: Icy_Response3978
body_snippet:
Icy_Response3978
•
1m ago

Five years in and getting fired twice in a week is the kind of week that makes everyone question whether they should be in this business. You shouldn't. Two things stood out to me reading this.

One - the family that hired their previous agent's friend wasn't a referral problem, it was a relationship-decay problem. You were on and off with them for 9 months. The other agent had one closing's worth of equity built up and that beat your 9 months of follow-up. That's not
